Milwaukee's Leader in

Welcome

Legacy Auto Body

Legacy Auto Body has been serving Milwaukee and the surrounding region with premium auto body services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Milwaukee Trusts Legacy Auto Body

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →
Affiliations & Certifications
What We Do

Our Services

Collision Repair

Milwaukee's mix of urban traffic and winter road conditions leads to more fender benders than most cities. Our collision...

Paintless Dent Repair

Hailstorms from Lake Michigan and shopping cart dings in Brookfield's parking lots don't have to mean a full repaint. Ou...

Rust Repair

Milwaukee's heavy winter salting causes rust that starts small but can total a vehicle if untreated. We specialize in cu...

Auto Painting

Milwaukee's extreme temperature swings—from humid summers to subzero winters—demand paintwork that flexes without cracki...

Frame Straightening

After hitting one of Milwaukee's notorious potholes or winter slide-offs, your car's frame might be bent without visible...
Our Difference

The Benefits of Choosing Legacy Auto Body

  • ✦
    Quality Craftsmanship

    Every project completed to the highest standards of excellence

Contact Us →
“
Legacy cut out all the rot in my '08 Silverado's wheel wells and used corrosion-resistant panels. Two winters later with regular undercarriage washes at their recommended Bay View spot, zero rust has returned. Worth every penny.
— Mitch R.
